title: Validity Period of Special License. The special license shall be valid for
content: 28 six (6) years from date of issuance subject to the validity of the POSE-registration, or 29 unless sooner revoked, terminated, suspended, or cancelled by the Secretary or his/her 30 duly authorized representative. 31 32
